summary: Frontend testing of critical bug fixes for Waterdrop Survivor. All 8 critical tests passed. Slot machine pull button works with both slotCoins and freeShopSpins, chests show gem costs, character shows max level 3 for common rarity, META/Talent/Pet panels all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Annunaki Cache chest still shows ★ 4500 gold cost (not gems) - appears intentional as a special chest but worth confirming with main agent
Note: App requires introSeen:true in localStorage (not just tutorialDone:true) to skip the A.I.D.A. intro dialogue
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage wds.save.v1 with: gold:50000, gems:500, slotCoins:5, freeShopSpins:3, tutorialDone:true, introSeen:true, character:{rarity:'common',level:0,pieces:50,shards:0}
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified: (1) Slot machine pull button ENABLED when slotCoins>0 ✅, (2) Free spin pull button ENABLED when freeShopSpins>0 ✅, (3) Slot coin decrements correctly after spin ✅, (4) Chests show 💎 gem costs ✅, (5) Character panel shows 'Common - Lv 0/3' for common rarity ✅, (6) META tab shows progress bars (0/100, 0/80 etc) ✅, (7) Talent tree shows 🌿 TP cost per node (1 TP shown) ✅, (8) Camp loads without crash ✅. Important: localStorage key must include introSeen:true to skip A.I.D.A. intro. Card shop has a type selector (PASSIVE/ACTIVE/AUTO/MANUAL) before the slot machine.
